stemHtml: A primary ice detection system can be defined as a system that…

options.a: only detects ice accretion on the primary flight control surfaces.
options.b: only provides an advisory annunciation of the presence of ice accretion or icing conditions.
options.c: can be relied upon as the sole means of detecting ice accretion or icing conditions.
options.d: cannot be used to activate the ice protection systems.
